thread.title: Harness Engineering (智能体脚手架)
thread.definitionDraft: Harness Engineering is the practice of designing the runtime framework around an LLM — tool exposure and schemas, context plumbing, the agent main loop, permissions and sandboxing, sub-agent dispatch, error recovery and stopping conditions — i.e. how the model’s output actually touches the world.
thread.whyNow: Anthropic explicitly calls the Claude Agent SDK "a general-purpose agent harness" and argues that even a frontier model running across many context windows performs poorly without a well-designed harness; in 2026 "agent harness engineering" was named as its own discipline (O’Reilly Radar, awesome lists, vendor harness docs).
thread.useBoundary: Focus on the runtime framework/scaffolding layer around a model (loop, tools, context, guardrails, sub-agents). Distinct from loop-engineering (human-designed automation loops), context-engineering (what goes in the window), and agentic-coding (the coding capability itself).

sourceRequirements.companyStrategyContextPolicy: Company strategy sources may be kept only as optional company_strategy_context targets and must not count toward topic readiness.

edges.evidenceNote: Anthropic 的 ACI 一词与 SWE-agent 论文提出的 ACI 同名同源，工具接口设计是共同论点。
前者提出"像做 HCI 一样做 ACI"，后者落到"动作空间设计/fewer tools"具体实践。
同为 Anthropic，前者讲 harness 设计哲学，后者把同一套 harness 产品化为 SDK。
两家用不同原语（compaction vs guardrails/handoffs）解同一问题：把模型包成可运行 agent 的 harness。
ReAct 奠定 think-act-observe 主循环，SWE-agent 在此循环上加专用 ACI 工具接口。
行业把 Anthropic 的一手实践抽象命名为 "harness engineering" 学科。
社区列表把这些实现源聚合为同一领域的工具谱系，反向证明 harness 已成独立工程对象。
smolagents 的极简 code-agent harness 正是"少而精工具+清晰动作空间"主张的落地。

review.notes: Deep-core 2026-06-21: 16 sources / 8 edges. NO arXiv paper named "harness" exists — paper_foundation honestly substituted with SWE-agent ACI (2405.15793, verified) + ReAct (2210.03629, verified). 4 sources at source_pack_review (seeing-like-agent, 2 Boris transcripts, Addy Osmani blog) pending fulltext capture. Roles all >=2.
